evals.prompt:
Render a complete Diátaxis documentation set from the sample session findings corpus.

Run:

  OUTDIR=$(pwd)
  $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/packs/channels/diataxis/scripts/render-diataxis.sh "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/findings" "$OUTDIR/docs" example-topic

The renderer reads the surviving findings directly (no separate synthesis step) and writes a full Diátaxis tree under docs/.
evals.expected_output: A complete Diátaxis documentation tree under docs/: a top-level index.md; a reference/ page per finding (grouped by dimension) plus reference/index.md; a per-dimension explanation/<dim>.md and how-to/apply-<dim>.md plus their indexes; and tutorials/getting-started.md, a per-dimension tutorials/<dim>.md, and tutorials/index.md. Every page carries MIF Level-1 frontmatter (a base concept @context/@type/@id/conceptType/created plus diataxis_type) with no frontmatter title:, one body H1, and prose free of any internal-research identity (no urn:mif:concept:/report:, no extensions.harness or corpus paths, no finding handles).

deterministic_checks.description: Top-level documentation landing page
Reference quadrant index
Explanation quadrant index
How-to quadrant index
Tutorials quadrant index
Orientation tutorial across the corpus
A per-finding reference page (one per finding, grouped by dimension)
A per-dimension explanation page
A per-dimension how-to guide
A per-dimension guided tutorial
Reference page carries the reference diataxis_type marker
Reference page carries its own MIF L1 urn:mif:doc: identity
Reference page carries the MIF L1 conceptType field
Reference page documents its evidence/citations
Reference page cites the finding's public source
How-to carries the how-to diataxis_type marker
Explanation carries the explanation diataxis_type marker
Tutorial carries the tutorial diataxis_type marker
No finding-concept URN identity leaks into a reference page (its own urn:mif:doc: @id is legitimate)
No harness schema paths in a reference page
No corpus paths in a reference page
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in a reference page
No finding-concept URN identity leaks into an explanation page
No harness schema paths in an explanation page
No corpus paths in an explanation page
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in an explanation page
No finding-concept URN identity leaks into a how-to page
No harness schema paths in a how-to page
No corpus paths in a how-to page
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in a how-to page
No finding-concept URN identity leaks into the tutorial
No harness schema paths in the tutorial
No corpus paths in the tutorial
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in the tutorial
